patch:
--- a/parity_checker_16bit.v
+++ b/parity_checker_16bit.v
@@ -1,10 +1,10 @@
 module parity_checker_16bit (
   input [15:0] data_in,
   input enable,
   output reg parity_out
 );
-  always @(data_in) begin
+  always @(*) begin
     if (enable) begin
       parity_out = ^data_in;
     end
   end
 endmodule
before_code:
module parity_checker_16bit (
  input [15:0] data_in,
  input enable,
  output reg parity_out
);
  always @(data_in) begin
    if (enable) begin
      parity_out = ^data_in;
    end
  end
endmodule
after_code:
module parity_checker_16bit (
  input [15:0] data_in,
  input enable,
  output reg parity_out
);
  always @(*) begin
    if (enable) begin
      parity_out = ^data_in;
    end
  end
endmodule
